---
title: Anouk Mirelez
type: person
aliases: [anouk]
summary: Founder of Junipergrid Labs.
---

Anouk Mirelez is the founder of Junipergrid Labs. Anouk pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

---
title: Calliope Saltmarsh
type: person
aliases: [calliope]
summary: Founder of Tidecraft Systems.
---

Calliope Saltmarsh is the founder of Tidecraft Systems. Calliope shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

---
title: Junipergrid Labs
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Anouk Mirelez.
---

Junipergrid Labs is a seed-stage company. Founded by Anouk Mirelez. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Harborlight Ventures
type: org
summary: Early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.
---

Harborlight Ventures is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Anouk Mirelez and Calliope Saltmarsh both want Harborlight Ventures in the Junipergrid Labs round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
